title: OPC UA Machinery Equipment
description: JSON Schema for machine equipment information based on OPC UA Machinery v1.04. Simplified for MQTT payload use.

description.description: Additional information and description about the MachineryEquipment. Should be used if Description Attribute cannot be written via OPC UA and should be ideally identical to Description Attribute.

deviceClass.description: Class of the MachineryEquipment (e.g.: Each drill of a company has the DeviceClass - drill)

MachineryEquipmentTypeId.description: Identification of a generic MachineryEquipment. Defined by each company (e.g., company has an MachineryEquipmentTypeId for all 8 mm drills).

componentName.description: User-assigned name for the MachineryEquipment. (vendor-provided, read-only)

assetId.description: Companywide unique ID for a specific asset (Each 8 mm drill of a company has the same MachineryEquipmentTypeId and a unique AssetId). (user-configurable)

location.description: Location of the MachineryEquipment (e.g.: Storage Location; Position in the Tool Changer; Position on the machine). (user-configurable)

localizedText.description: Text with optional locale information. Can be a simple string or an object with locale and text properties.

oneOf.description: Array of localized text values for multiple languages
